overview.description: The Overlay Shares Small Cap Equity ETF (OVS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is actively managed to provide exposure to small cap U.S. equities combined with a put spread option overlay strategy. OVS was launched on Sep 30, 2019 and is issued by Liquid Strategies.
